name: PER_INTG_TALEO_EXPORT_M
description: This table holds information about the person records that needs to be exported as part of integration.

columns.Name: TALEO_EXPORT_ID
columns.Comments: This is a system generated primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for a person.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning.

columns.Name: DATE_OF_BIRTH
columns.Comments: Date of birth of the person for export.

columns.Name: PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Number assigned to the person, to identify the person uniquely in any context, not dependent on being an employee, contingent worker, etc.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID1
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for a person.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: First name of the person. This value is copied from per_person_names_f.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_ID
columns.Comments: System generated identifier for person name.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE1
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE1
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: NAME_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number from person name.

columns.Name: MIDDLE_NAMES
columns.Comments: Middle names of the person. This value is copied from per_person_names_f table.

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: Last name of the person. This value is copied from per_person_names_f table.

columns.Name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Email address of the person. This value is copied from per_email_addresses table.

columns.Name: EMAIL_ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: Email address identifier of the person.

columns.Name: EMAIL_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number from email address.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Display phone number of the person.

columns.Name: PHONE_ID
columns.Comments: Phone identifier of the person.

columns.Name: EXTENSION
columns.Comments: Extension phone number of the person.

columns.Name: NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_NUMBER
columns.Comments: National identifier number of the person.

columns.Name: NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_ID
columns.Comments: National identifier of the person.

columns.Name: NID_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number of national identifier.

columns.Name: USERNAME
columns.Comments: The latest principal username of the user

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for the user record of a person.

columns.Name: USER_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number from per_users table for the person.

columns.Name: USER_ACCOUNT_ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the person has an active user account.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Denotes the translated name for the Organization Unit.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for an organization.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE4
columns.Comments: Effective start date of the organization.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE4
columns.Comments: Effective end date of the organization.

columns.Name: DEPT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number of the organization.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the organization. This value will be unique for an organization.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID1
columns.Comments: System generated identifier for the organization.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE5
columns.Comments: Effective start date of the organization.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE5
columns.Comments: Effective end date of the organization.

columns.Name: CLASSIFICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Classification code of the organization.

columns.Name: ORG_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number of the organization.

columns.Name: NAME1
columns.Comments: Translated name of the job according to session langauge.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: System generated identifier of the job.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE6
columns.Comments: Effective start date of the job.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE6
columns.Comments: Effective end date of the job of the person for export.

columns.Name: JOB_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number of the job.

columns.Name: USERNAME1
columns.Comments: The latest principal username of the manager.

columns.Name: USER_ID1
columns.Comments: System generated user identifier for the manager.

columns.Name: MGR_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number of the user record of manager.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE11
columns.Comments: Address Line 1 of the person's home address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE21
columns.Comments: Address Line 2 of the person's home address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE31
columns.Comments: Address Line 3 of the person's home address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE41
columns.Comments: Address Line 4 of the person's home address.

columns.Name: POSTAL_CODE1
columns.Comments: Postal code of the person's home address.

columns.Name: REGION_11
columns.Comments: Region 1 of the person's home address.

columns.Name: TIMEZONE_CODE1
columns.Comments: Timezone code of the person's home address

columns.Name: COUNTRY1
columns.Comments: Country of the person's home address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: System generated identifier of the person's home address.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE3
columns.Comments: Effective start date of the person's home address.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE3
columns.Comments: Effective end date of the person's home address.

columns.Name: CORRESPONDENCE_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Lookup identifies language to use for this communication.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_1
columns.Comments: Address line 1 of the location.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_2
columns.Comments: Address line 2 of the location.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_3
columns.Comments: Address line 3 of the location.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_4
columns.Comments: Address line 4 of the location.

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Country of the location of the person for export.

columns.Name: LOCATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the location of the person for export.

columns.Name: LOCATION_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the location of the person for export.

columns.Name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: Postal code of the location's address.

columns.Name: REGION_1
columns.Comments: Primary region in which the address is located.

columns.Name: TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the standard timezone boundary under which the address falls.

columns.Name: TOWN_OR_CITY
columns.Comments: Name of town or city of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated identifier of the location.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE2
columns.Comments: Effective start date of the location.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE2
columns.Comments: Effective end date of the location.

columns.Name: USER_TYPE_COLLECTION
columns.Comments: User type collection value for the export process.

columns.Name: USER_TYPE_1
columns.Comments: User type for the export process.

columns.Name: JOB_ROLE_CODE
columns.Comments: Job role code for the export process.

columns.Name: CONFIRM_PROFILE
columns.Comments: Confirm profile value for the export process.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_CANDIDATE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the candidate is internal.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_PROFILE_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Profile language of the candidate.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the employee. Indicates if the employee is active.

columns.Name: CONFIGURATION_PROFILE_CODE
columns.Comments: Configuration profile code value for the export process.

columns.Name: MANAGER_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Manager level of the person.Indicates the manager hierarchy level of the person.

columns.Name: APPLICANT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique number for people who are applicants. This is in addition to PERSON_NUMBER. Allows global tracking of applicants..

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Determinant for set enabled tables and those using business unit as a partitioning key.

columns.Name: VACANCY_ID
columns.Comments: Vacancy identifier for the job or position for which person is a candidate.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for the assignment of a person.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE7
columns.Comments: Effective start date of assignment.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE7
columns.Comments: Effective end date of assignment.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the order of different changes made during a day. The lowest value represents the earliest change in the day.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_LATEST_CHANGE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: 'Y' indicates that this row represents the latest change in the day.

columns.Name: ASG_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Object version number of assignment.

columns.Name: HOMEADDRESSTOWNORCITY
columns.Comments: Name of the town or city of the person's home address.

columns.Name: ACTION_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of action for the export process.

columns.Name: ACTION_ACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the first start date for the export process.

columns.Name: NAME_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of person name for the export process.

columns.Name: PERPPF_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of person's workrelationship for the export process.

columns.Name: USER_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Disconnected Mobile: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row. This value is different from LAST_UPDATE_DATE if the update originally happened in a different database (i.e. a different mobile database or the server).

columns.Name: PERSON_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of person for the export process.

columns.Name: EMAIL_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of person's email for the export process.

columns.Name: NID_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of person's national identifier for the export process.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of person's address for the export process.

columns.Name: ROLE_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of role for the export process.

columns.Name: PHONE_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date of person's phone for the export process.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE
columns.Comments: Assignment status type of person.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
